texto: Edmund doesn’t solve any of his grievances or personality disorders by going through the wardrobe. If anything, they're exacerbated and brought to a crisis by his experiences in Narnia. When you go to Narnia, your worries come with you. Narnia just becomes the place where you work them out and try to resolve them.
explicacao: Citação de Levi Grossman sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “Edmund doesn’t solve any of his grievances or personality disorders by going through the wardrobe…” articula trabalho, fiction, imagination em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e imagination.

frase_original: Edmund doesn’t solve any of his grievances or personality disorders by going through the wardrobe. Narnia just becomes the place where you work them out and try to resolve them.
